headings: IV. Insurance Policy Deductibles and Self-Insured Retentions.
text: - b. Owner Responsible for Payment of Deductibles and Self-Insured Retentions. Owner  shall  be  responsible  for  payment  of  the  deductibles  and  self-insured retentions  set  forth  in  the  OCIP  Policies  and  in  the  Builder's  Risk  Policy,  both during the period of construction and during the completed-operations coverage period.  Enrolled Parties of every tier shall be responsible for a CGL Deductible Contribution and a Builder's Risk Deductible Contribution, as set forth below.
